ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drought_monitoring" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the province */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the year */,
  "SMN" TEXT /* Standardized Precipitation Index (SMN) */,
  "SMT" TEXT /* Standardized Precipitation Index (SMT) */,
  "VCI" TEXT /* Vegetation Condition Index (VCI) */,
  "TCI" TEXT /* Temperature Condition Index (TCI) */,
  "VHI" TEXT /* Vegetation Health Index (VHI) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "drought_level" TEXT /* Drought severity level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was inserted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was updated */,
  "machine_learning_prediction" REAL /* Predicted drought scenario based on machine learning algorithms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id", "year", "week")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the province is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the province */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the province */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the province */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the province data was inserted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the province data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user data was inserted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Province ID associated with the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Content of the alert message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source data was inserted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model data was inserted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
